AR1.justification: Routed to observations.md with explicit reasoning, but the Generated-by value 'user' contradicts the methodology's strict bar (agent drafting on user's behalf is 'inference' per methodology.md#provenance-markers); routing of file is correct, routing of provenance marker value is off.

AR2.justification: Non-procedure scenario; artifact-binding does not apply.

AR3.justification: Notes reference methodology.md#provenance-markers correctly, but the on-disk entry itself carries no cross-reference and no link back from observations.md to methodology — references live in chat-only context, not the file.

AR4.justification: Entry was appended under an ISO-dated header below the newest-at-bottom marker; re-running would append a new dated entry rather than mutate the existing one — append-only and coherent.
